join_order.notes: For each of ~300K qualifying custkeys, binary-search orders_custkey_sorted then iterate matching order rows; apply o_orderdate < 9204 inline
For each of ~1.47M qualifying orderkeys, binary-search lineitem_orderkey_sorted then iterate matching lineitem rows; apply l_shipdate > 9204 inline

filters.notes: Load building_code at runtime from customer/c_mktsegment.dict; scan c_mktsegment.bin sequentially, collect qualifying row indices, then gather c_custkey values
Applied inline during orders index traversal per custkey
Applied inline during lineitem index traversal per orderkey

data_structures.customer_qualifying_keys: flat_array(int32_t, ~300K) — collected in parallel per thread partition, custkeys of rows passing mktsegment filter
data_structures.orders_index: pre_built_index(orders_custkey_sorted) — mmap'd sorted pairs, binary search per custkey
data_structures.lineitem_index: pre_built_index(lineitem_orderkey_sorted) — mmap'd sorted pairs, binary search per orderkey
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local compact_hash_map<GroupKey{orderkey,orderdate,shippriority}, double> — pre_sized ~500K buckets per thread; merged via reduction at end

indexes.purpose: join_lookup — binary search for each qualifying c_custkey → iterate matching order row_ids
join_lookup — binary search for each qualifying o_orderkey → iterate matching lineitem row_ids
skip_blocks — optional early pruning if scanning orders directly (not primary path here)
skip_blocks — optional early pruning if scanning lineitem directly (not primary path here)

parallelism.partition_dimension: customer rows — divide 1,500,000 customer rows into ~64 morsels (~23,437 rows each); each thread independently scans its morsel, performs index lookups on orders and lineitem, and accumulates into a thread-local aggregation map
parallelism.merge_phase: reduce thread-local hash maps into single global map; then partial_sort top-10

aggregation.note: Thread-local maps reduce contention; merge is O(groups) per thread

output.strategy: partial_sort or priority_queue over merged aggregation map
